# Feature Specification: [FEATURE NAME]

## User Scenarios & Testing

### User Story 1 - Notifications (Priority: P1)

As a user, I want fast and user-friendly notifications so that the app feels modern.

TODO: write acceptance criteria.

## Requirements

### Functional Requirements

- FR-001: The system shall send notifications quickly and store them and let users
  configure them as appropriate.
- FR-002: Notifications must be more reliable than the old system.
- FR-003: Use React and Postgres to build a robust, scalable notification service.
  We might need websockets in the future.

### Key Entities

- Notification: [NEEDS CLARIFICATION: what fields does a notification have?]

## Success Criteria

### Measurable Outcomes

- Notifications should be fast and users should be happy.
